info.title: Docker Infra API
info.description: Initial API contract for Docker Infra. Secret values are never included in examples.

post.summary: Ensure local Docker Infra host is the Swarm manager and overlay network exists
Register or update a managed node
post.description: Create a new managed node when `node_id` is omitted. Update an existing non-master node when `node_id` is supplied. Password is required for first-time registration and optional when reusing a stored SSH key during update.

example.content:
services:
  web:
    image: nginx:1.27
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "true"]

sessionCookie.name: docker_infra_session
sessionCookie.description: Password-only login session cookie. The login API itself does not require a user ID.

masked_value.description: Masked placeholder only; never return the original secret.
